summary: Tested iteration 33 features: Influencer analytics endpoint, CartPage i18n translations, Spanish/English locale updates. All features working correctly with one minor fix applied.
passed_tests: GET /api/influencer/analytics requires authentication (returns 401 without session)
GET /api/influencer/analytics returns chart_data array with daily stats
GET /api/influencer/analytics returns summary with total_clicks, total_conversions, total_revenue, total_commission, conversion_rate
GET /api/influencer/analytics supports days parameter (7, 30, 90)
InfluencerDashboard imports and renders InfluencerAnalytics component
InfluencerAnalytics component has data-testid='influencer-analytics'
InfluencerAnalytics shows when status=active and discount_code exists
InfluencerAnalytics displays stats cards: Clics en código, Conversiones, Tasa conversión, Ventas generadas, Comisiones ganadas
InfluencerAnalytics displays charts: Clics vs Conversiones, Ingresos y Comisiones
Spanish locale (es.json) has cart.quantity = 'Cantidad'
Spanish locale (es.json) has cart.onlyInStock = 'Solo {{count}} en stock'
Spanish locale (es.json) has checkout.emailVerified = 'Email verificado'
Spanish locale (es.json) has checkout.emailVerifiedSuccess = '¡Email verificado correctamente!'
English locale (en.json) has cart.quantity = 'Quantity'
English locale (en.json) has cart.onlyInStock = 'Only {{count}} in stock'
English locale (en.json) has checkout.emailVerified = 'Email verified'
English locale (en.json) has checkout.emailVerifiedSuccess = 'Email verified successfully!'
CartPage uses t('cart.quantity') for quantity display
CartPage uses t('cart.onlyInStock') for stock warning
CartPage uses t('checkout.emailVerified') for verified badge
CartPage shows 'Email verified' badge when user email is verified
CartPage hides verification banner when email is verified
seed_data_creation: Used existing test influencer from iteration 32
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 33 features all working. Influencer analytics endpoint returns chart_data and summary stats. CartPage i18n translations verified for quantity, onlyInStock, emailVerified, emailVerifiedSuccess in both Spanish and English locales. Minor fix applied: added missing 'cart.checkout' key to both locale files.

influencer_analytics_endpoint.details: GET /api/influencer/analytics returns chart_data (daily clicks, conversions, revenue, commission) and summary stats

influencer_dashboard_analytics_section.details: InfluencerAnalytics component renders when status=active and discount_code exists, shows stats cards and charts

cartpage_i18n_quantity.details: CartPage uses t('cart.quantity') - displays 'Quantity' in EN, 'Cantidad' in ES

cartpage_i18n_onlyInStock.details: CartPage uses t('cart.onlyInStock') - displays 'Only X in stock' in EN, 'Solo X en stock' in ES

cartpage_i18n_emailVerified.details: CartPage uses t('checkout.emailVerified') - displays 'Email verified' badge when email is verified

spanish_locale_cart_translations.details: es.json has quantity, onlyInStock, emailVerified, emailVerifiedSuccess keys

english_locale_cart_translations.details: en.json has quantity, onlyInStock, emailVerified, emailVerifiedSuccess keys

fixes_applied.fix: Added missing 'cart.checkout' key with value 'Proceed to Checkout'
Added missing 'cart.checkout' key with value 'Proceder al Pago'
